The '''Eclipse Moon''' is one of the three [[Moons of Peril]] imprisoned in [[Neypotzli]]. She is one of the [[nagua]] -alongside the [[Blood Moon]] and [[Blue Moon]]- who were originally summoned by a powerful shaman facing imminent death. Her companions disapproved and created Neypotzli to imprison the Moons and keep them from inflicting harm.{{CiteNPC|npc=Eyatlalli|quote=In the face of inevitable death, a powerful shaman decided to lash out and inflict death on others. Her fellows disagreed with her actions. They created this prison, and they summoned me to watch over it.}}

The Eclipse Moon has a unique [[flat armour]] stat of 6, which reduces the damage dealt against her by 6; during her Clone special attack, this value temporarily becomes 4.

==Fight overview==
{{Main|Moons of Peril/Strategies#Boss mechanics}}

The boss' standard attacks are a series of three hits, rolling accuracy and damage against the player's melee defence. Once the boss misses one of the hits, the remaining hits in the stack will automatically miss.

After six standard attacks, she will use one of two special attacks, alternating between them:
* '''Searing Rays ''' - A moon shield will appear, and the Eclipse Moon will forcefully shove you behind it. The Eclipse Moon will begin attacking with rays of light, which the player can avoid by moving alongside the moon shield.
* '''Clones''' - You are shoved to the centre of the room and are bound in place. Clones of the Eclipse Moon will spawn around you, attacking you in five cycles of three, for a total of 15 attacks. You must face your character toward each clone as it spawns to prevent damage. Doing so will parry the incoming attack, sending an undelayed attack back at the boss; as such, slow, high-hitting weapons are recommended to be used during this attack. '''Only melee weapons will damage the boss during this phase - ranged and magic weapons will not deal damage.'''

==Changes==

{{Subject changes
|date = 31 July 2024
|update = QoL Improvements & Further Deadman: Armageddon Tweaks
|change = The 100% weapon accuracy during the Eclipse Moon's clone phase is now present for all [[attack style]]s.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 17 April 2024
|update = Undead Pirates Tweaks, Varlamore CAs & More
|poll =
|change = The Eclipse Moon will no longer exploit a blind spot during her Searing Rays attack.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 3 April 2024
|update = Varlamore Tweaks & Drop Rates
|change = 
* The Eclipse Moon will now take damage normally at low health, and players should no longer deal 1 damage regularly when she is at low health.
* The Eclipse Moon can now be consistently killed during the Clone phase.
* The [[ring of recoil]] now correctly loses charges against the boss.
* Quick-escape is now the default option for the stairs in the boss' chamber.
}}
{{Subject changes
|date = 27 March 2024
|update = Easter & Varlamore Updates
|change = The Eclipse Moon boss's [[Defence]] has increased.
